calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account For The Benefit Of Minor: Devin Leung.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Continued To Oct-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Minors Compromise Of Plaintiff Devin Leung
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Tyson Redenbarger, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Mandy Yeung, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Deven Leung, present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $10,750.00
Attorney's Fees: $4,300 payable to Hooshmand Law Group.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $1,024.41
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $5,324.41
A net balance of $5,425.59 to be deposited into a blocked account at JP Morgan Chase Bank, 188 Spear Street, Suite 190 San Francisco, CA 94105 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 17, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-11-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Set For Trial On May-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
